title: Prior-art tracker for reusable IP protection
why_it_matters: A reusable invention pipeline needs a clean boundary between public prior art and private Tristan-generated ideas.
actionable_opportunity: Turn every paper or patent signal into a prior-art note before promoting related prototypes or public disclosures.

oak_check.risk: Public sources and private invention directions can be mixed too early without an explicit prior-art process.
oak_check.limit: This is an organizational safeguard, not legal advice.
oak_check.falsification_route: Pick one candidate invention and record at least three related public sources before promotion.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: Do not publish protectable mechanisms before IP posture is clarified.

next_action: Create the first prior-art entry and link it to a safe non-confidential briefing item.
business_funding_signal: Improves licensing, publication, and company-formation readiness.
